<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Billing Cycle dates"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/RateData/cycledates/{billingYearId}/{billingCycleId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets billing cycle start and end dates.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns array of billing cycle dates.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"billingCycleId":{"type":"integer","example":1},"billingPeriodId":{"type":"integer","example":5},"billingYearId":{"type":"integer","example":2024},"startDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-05-01T00:00:00"},"endDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-05-31T23:59:59"},"billingCycle":{"type":"object","properties":{"billingCycleId":{"type":"integer","example":1},"name":{"type":"string","example":"Cycle 1"},"isBiMonthly":{"type":"boolean","example":false}},"title":"BillingCycle"}},"title":"BillingCycleDate"}}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
